arts.ttl: Arne Slot picks Mo Salah replacement: €50m bid coming
arts.sum: Slot is eyeing Takefusa Kubo of Real Sociedad to fill the void that Salah could potentially leave should he take up a lucrative offer from the Saudi Pro League, which wants to make the attacker one of its figurehead stars alongside Cristiano Ronaldo.
